title: Dashboard Templates / Linked Automation Templates for Dashboards and Boards

posts.author: j.cevallos (Javier Cevallos)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi !

Can anyone provide information into the state of API integration for dashboards. Are there any posted road maps for API features like this that I should be looking for?

Some initial questions, I am looking to automate some business process through the v2API.

  • Am I able to create template dashboards with links to a template board. That way I can tie together the deployment of a template board and its dashboard in an action?
  • If not, can I create a template from another dashboard then populate the widgets through the api?
  • Can I assign users/teams access to these dashboards, or customize the view that each users sees for a dashboard based on team based access?

Thanks,

Javier

posts.author: ibad (ibad mohiuddin)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi! @j.cevallos were you able to resolve this?
